Certificates

Czechitas

Czechitas is a Czech non-profit organization that supports women in upskilling in IT. It provides courses in programming, data analysis, and other IT-related topics. Its strategic partners include well-known companies like Accenture, Cisco, Google, IBM SkillsBuild, or ThermoFisher. I have completed the following courses by Czechitas:

SQL Basics: Introduction to SQL

Python for Data Analysis: Python libraries Pandas, Matplotlib, Seaborn

IBM SkillsBuild

IBM SkillsBuild is an online learning platform that offers courses and certifications in various IT-related topics, including data science, artificial intelligence, cloud computing, and cybersecurity. I have completed the following course by IBM SkillsBuild:

Artificial Intelligence Fundamentals with Capstone Project: Introduction to AI by IBM SkillsBuild

View from Monte Boletto [1238 m] to lake Como (Italy)
